items.name: ng-utils
items.title: Utils (Angular)
items.description: Shared utilities for the Angular edition - cn() helper that merges Tailwind class names with conflict resolution (clsx + tailwind-merge).

items.name: ng-button
items.title: Button (Angular)
items.description: Button primitive for the Angular edition - 6 variants x 4 sizes, mirrors the shadcn/ui Button surface.

items.name: ng-scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area (Angular)
items.description: Thin design-system styling layer over ngx-scrollbar - overlay scrollbars with Gremorie tokens (thin, rounded, --border-colored thumb).

items.name: ng-attachments
items.title: Attachments (Angular)
items.description: Composable Attachment* family - List, Item, Preview, Info, Name, Size, Remove, Empty - plus type and util files. Lays out file attachments for chat surfaces.

items.name: ng-prompt-input
items.title: Prompt Input (Angular)
items.description: PromptInput family for AI chat surfaces - state machine (ready -> submitted -> streaming -> error), drag-drop, paste-to-attach. Ships textarea, submit, toolbar, tools, action-menu, model-select sub-components that compose together.

items.name: ng-chart
items.title: Chart (Angular)
items.description: Headless chart engine for the Angular edition - chart-context, scales, axis, cartesian-grid, chart-frame, plus shape helpers (area, line, bar, scatter, pie, polar, radar, radial-bar). Shared base for every styled chart.

items.name: ng-area-chart
items.title: Area Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled area chart - cumulative quantity over a continuous domain. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-line-chart
items.title: Line Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled line chart - trends over a continuous domain. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-bar-chart
items.title: Bar Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled bar chart - categorical comparison. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-scatter-chart
items.title: Scatter Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled scatter chart - x/y distribution. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-pie-chart
items.title: Pie Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled pie chart - part-to-whole. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-radar-chart
items.title: Radar Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled radar chart - multi-axis comparison. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-radial-chart
items.title: Radial Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled radial-bar chart - progress / gauge metaphor. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: rx-utils
items.title: Utils (React)
items.description: Shared utilities for the React edition - cn() helper that merges Tailwind class names with conflict resolution (clsx + tailwind-merge).

items.name: rx-button
items.title: Button (React)
items.description: Button primitive for the React edition - 6 variants x 8 sizes (including icon-only), `asChild` via Radix Slot. Mirrors the shadcn/ui Button surface.

items.name: rx-input
items.title: Input (React)
items.description: Input primitive for the React edition - single-line text field that adopts every native HTML `type`. Token-driven visual states.

items.name: rx-label
items.title: Label (React)
items.description: Label primitive built on `@radix-ui/react-label` (via `radix-ui` namespace). Pair with Input / form controls.

items.name: rx-select
items.title: Select (React)
items.description: Select primitive built on Radix Select - portalled, animated listbox, grouped items, scroll buttons. For short fixed lists (5-30 options).

items.name: rx-dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu (React)
items.description: DropdownMenu family built on Radix DropdownMenu - actions menu with checkbox / radio items, separators, nested submenus, destructive variant.

items.name: rx-hover-card
items.title: Hover Card (React)
items.description: HoverCard primitive built on Radix HoverCard - non-interactive preview pane shown on hover. Use for link previews, profile cards, image teasers.

items.name: rx-command
items.title: Command (React)
items.description: Command palette primitive built on cmdk - inline picker (Combobox pattern) for keyboard-first navigation. The Cmd+K dialog variant lands when rx-overlays ships Dialog.

items.name: rx-prompt-input
items.title: Prompt Input (React)
items.description: PromptInput family for AI chat surfaces - state machine, drag-drop, paste-to-attach, status-driven Submit. Includes ActionMenu (dropdown), ModelSelector (select), attachment HoverCard previews, Speech button (Web Speech API), and Command palette wrappers.
